deblur.positive: Clearly and decisively sharpen this exact photo, recovering crisp fine detail and removing softness and haze. Keep every object, person and background exactly the same. Photorealistic.
deblur.negative: still blurry, soft, hazy, passive, no change, repainted, changed people, changed background, distortion, artifacts

relight_day.positive: Fully convert this scene to clear bright midday daylight - blue sky, real sunlight, natural shadows. It must clearly be daytime, not a dim in-between dusk. Keep all edges sharp with no blur or smearing, and keep every object and person exactly where it is. Photorealistic.
relight_day.negative: dusk, dim, between day and night, night, blur, smear, smudged, motion blur, added objects, removed objects, distortion, artifacts

object_insert_fire.positive: Add a clearly visible fire that has broken out on a solid surface in the scene, with realistic spreading flames, smoke and embers matching the scene's geometry. Keep the existing terrain, water and background exactly as they are - do not extend the shoreline or add new ground, and never place fire on water. Keep all people and objects unchanged. Photorealistic.
object_insert_fire.negative: campfire, fire on water, added shoreline, extended terrain, new ground, changed people, distortion, artifacts

normalize.positive: Apply only a subtle photographic clean-up: neutral white balance, balanced exposure and natural, accurate colors. Keep the content completely unchanged - same objects, people, background, composition and type of lighting. Photorealistic.
normalize.negative: color cast, overexposed, underexposed, stylized filter, relit, day-for-night, changed content, added objects, removed objects, changed people, repainted scene, distortion, artifacts

change_clothing.positive: Dress the same people already in this photo in a full colorful clown costume (polka-dot suit, ruffled collar, big shoes, clown hat). Keep exactly the same number of people - do not add any extra clown. Keep their faces, poses and the background, and update their reflections on shiny surfaces to match the costume. Photorealistic.
change_clothing.negative: added clown, extra person, added people, removed people, clown makeup, face paint, changed face, wrong reflection, missing reflection, changed background, distortion, artifacts
